leadText: Mud-Slap (Japanese: どろかけ Mud Spray) is a damage-dealing Ground-type move introduced in Generation II. It was TM31 in Generation II, and is TM005 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation II 1.2 Generation III onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II [ edit | edit source ] Mud-Slap inflicts damage and has a 99.6% chance of lowering the target's accuracy stat by one stage. Generation III onwards [ edit | edit source ] Mud-Slap now always lowers the target's accuracy by one stage. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , Mud-Slap inflicts damage and obscures the user, making attacks targeting the user more likely to miss. Mud-Slap can be used as the first move of a Pokémon Contest combination , causing Mud Sport and Sand-Attack to score double the normal appeal if used in the next turn. It can also be used to finish a combination, with the user gaining 2 bonus appeal points if Mud Sport , Sand Attack , or Sandstorm was used in the previous turn. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad2 An attack that fires dirt, inflicting damage and reducing the target's accuracy. G S C Reduces the foe's accuracy. R S E Hurls mud in the foe's face to reduce its accuracy. FR LG Mud is hurled in the foe's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy. Colo XD Hurls mud in the target's face to reduce accuracy. D P Pt HG SS PBR The user hurls mud in the foe's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy. LA The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target. It also lowers the target's Accuracy by one level. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It also reduces the target's accuracy by 1 level. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも めいちゅうを １だんかいさげる Conq. The user slaps dirt at the target, dealing damage and lowering the opponent's accuracy. MD GtI S MD It damages an enemy. It also lowers its accuracy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move originated as a TCG attack . From Generation IV onwards, Secret Power has the animation of Mud-Slap if used on sandy terrains.
